expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Add a notification center with read state, filtering, and clear-read actions.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persisting notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want read state stored so that notification state survives across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Read state persists across sessions.",
        "Unread and read values are stored per notification.",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/schema.ts",
        "src/notifications/storage.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Showing notification list and unread badge",
      "description": "As a user, I want a notification list and unread badge so that I can see new activity quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Unread notifications show an unread badge.",
        "Users can open the notification list.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/components/NotificationBadge.tsx",
        "src/notifications/components/NotificationList.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Updating notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I can manage what I have seen.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Users can mark a notification read or unread.",
        "State changes persist through the storage layer.",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/actions.ts",
        "src/notifications/service.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Filtering notifications by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification list filters by read and unread state.",
        "Filter changes update visible notifications.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/components/NotificationList.tsx",
        "src/notifications/components/NotificationFilter.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Clearing read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that I can keep the center tidy.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Users can clear all read notifications.",
        "Unread notifications remain after the clear action.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/actions.ts",
        "src/notifications/components/ClearReadNotificationsButton.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
